sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9275" key="a)norekte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνορ-εκτέω</orth>, <sense id="n9275.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have no appetite,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5:29:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.29.8</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
